recommendations.title: The Devil and Daniel Johnston
recommendations.overview: This 2005 documentary film chronicles the life of Daniel Johnston, a manic-depressive genius singer/songwriter/artist, from childhood up to the present, with an emphasis on his mental illness and how it manifested itself in demonic self-obsession.

recommendations.title: Avicii: True Stories
recommendations.overview: Documentary about the arena-packing Swedish DJ, chronicling his explosive rise to fame and surprising decision to retire from live performances in 2016.

recommendations.title: Roger Waters: The Wall
recommendations.overview: A concert film that the former Pink Floyd singer-songwriter made on various tour dates between 2010 and 2013, when he was playing his former group's 1980 double-album in its entirety.

recommendations.title: Let It Be
recommendations.overview: A documentary chronicling the Beatles' rehearsal sessions in January 1969 for their proposed "back to basics" album, "Get Back," later re-envisioned and released as "Let It Be."

recommendations.title: Maluma: What I Was, What I Am, What I Will Be
recommendations.overview: Intimate interviews, sold out concerts and archive footage that narrates the path to success of the Colombian singer and songwriter Maluma.

recommendations.title: Miss Americana
recommendations.overview: A raw and emotionally revealing look at one of the most iconic artists of our time during a transformational period in her life as she learns to embrace her role not only as a songwriter and performer, but as a woman harnessing the full power of her

recommendations.title: BLACKPINK: Light Up the Sky
recommendations.overview: Record-shattering Korean girl band BLACKPINK tell their story —  and detail the hard fought journey of the dreams and trials behind their meteoric rise.

recommendations.title: Mia Martini - I Am Mia
recommendations.overview: The movie is a biopic about Mia Martini, an italian singer who died in 1995.

recommendations.title: Bob Marley: One Love
recommendations.overview: Jamaican singer-songwriter Bob Marley overcomes adversity to become the most famous reggae musician in the world.

recommendations.title: ariana grande: excuse me, i love you
recommendations.overview: Ariana Grande takes the stage in London for her Sweetener World Tour and shares a behind-the-scenes look at her life in rehearsal and on the road.
